title: Fool's Gold
description: This is a mod for fabric 1.19.2, adding pyrite to the game!
body:
Welcome to fool's gold! A mod adding pyrite to the game, a somewhat dangerous substance. Although no weapons can be made with it _(YET)_, you can make various things that might aid you in battle. We may or may not have made a few items that aren't shown in the creative menu, but don't worry, they're absolutely obtainable. You can find them through commands and JEI, and of course, crafting.                                                                            
**THIS MOD IS MADE FOR THE AOS SMP, BUGS ARE EXPECTED, MOD IS SUBJECT TO HEAVY CHANGES IN THE 2.0 UPDATE.**
